title: Upstart Holdings Inc (UPST) Q3 2024 Earnings: Revenue Hits $162M, EPS Loss Beats Estimates
text: Upstart Holdings reported Q3 2024 earnings with total revenue of $162 million, an increase of 20% from Q3 2023 and up 27% sequentially, exceeding analyst estimates of $150.22 million. The company reported GAAP net loss of $6.8 million, translating to loss per share of $0.07, which beat the estimated loss of $0.51 per share. Contribution profit was $102.4 million in Q3 2024, up 9% year-over-year, with contribution margin of 61% compared to 64% in Q3 2023. Adjusted EBITDA returned to positive territory at 1% of total revenue, down from 2% in Q3 2023. Loan originations reached 188,149 loans totaling $1.6 billion, up 30% year-over-year and up 43% sequentially. With 43% sequential growth in lending volume and return to positive adjusted EBITDA, Upstart strengthened its position as the fintech leader in artificial intelligence.
